testcase.name: test_threshold_rule_and_cooldown
testcase.system-out:
--------------------------------- Captured Log ---------------------------------
--------------------------------- Captured Out --------------------------------- [DataAlertRulesEngine] 告警规则引擎 - add_rule: cache_hit_rate_low, 状态: success [DataAlertRulesEngine] 告警规则引擎 - add_rule: data_quality_degraded, 状态: success [DataAlertRulesEngine] 告警规则引擎 - add_rule: processing_error_rate_high, 状态: success [DataAlertRulesEngine] 告警规则引擎 - add_rule: response_time_high, 状态: success [DataAlertRulesEngine] 告警规则引擎 - add_rule: connection_failed, 状态: success [DataAlertRulesEngine] 告警规则引擎 - initialized: DataAlertRulesEngine, 状态: success [DataAlertRulesEngine] 告警规则引擎 - evaluate_rules: 5 rules, 状态: 1 alerts [DataAlertRulesEngine] 告警规则引擎 - evaluate_rules: 5 rules, 状态: 0 alerts

testcase.name: test_composite_rule_triggers_on_any_condition
testcase.system-out:

testcase.name: test_suppression_blocks_alerts_by_rule_id
testcase.system-out:
